purpose: Minimal workflow proving lean SessionStart reattachment after resume or compact. Covers the deferred Phase 4 runtime gate.

setup.repoSeed: A small task split into at least two units where the session can be interrupted after unit 1 completes and resumed in a fresh session.

acceptance: After resume, the fresh session reads the lean COW_RESUME_POINTER_V1 context
Completed unit 1 is not re-run or re-delegated
The next planned unit is executed from the ledger/plan, not from memory
State is reconstructed from plan + ledger + git when needed
liveRunPolicy: Run only after F1-F4 complete and usage remains available. Requires a session interrupt + fresh session, so it is environment-sensitive.
